cross_scene_arcs.title: Heist Preparation and Execution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chris progresses from acquiring tools under false pretenses to active participation in multiple heists, executing technical breaches and securing targets before being wounded during escape.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: wounded and disoriented during chaotic escape
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Waingro's uncontrolled violence threatens team safety; escape route remains untested

cross_scene_arcs.title: Relationship with Neil McCauley
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chris maintains a close operational and emotional bond with Neil, from shared planning and heist execution to reliance during injury and final farewells.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: established prior bond with Neil McCauley from San Quentin
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: reaffirms bond with Neil as 'brother' before parting ways

cross_scene_arcs.title: Domestic Conflict with Charlene
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chris's relationship with Charlene deteriorates from violent control to emotional dependence and finally a determined effort to retrieve her despite physical and logistical risks.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: asserts dominance over Charlene through physical threat
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: plans to drive to retrieve Charlene despite injury and lack of documents
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Charlene's safety and intent to leave remain uncertain

cross_scene_arcs.title: Physical and Emotional Deterioration
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Chris declines from emotional distress and hangover to severe injury and veterinary treatment, culminating in a compromised but determined state during recovery.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: physically injured and hungover, showing personal deterioration
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: physically limited with arm in sling but in possession of travel documents and a DMV-ready vehicle
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: risk of infection or permanent injury due to substandard medical conditions

cross_scene_arcs.title: Heist Leadership and Operational Discipline
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Neil plans and executes high-stakes heists with precision, maintaining control through strict discipline and timing, from initial infiltration to crew leadership and violent escalation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: preparing for covert hospital operation under false identity
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: committing to lead a major bank heist with full operational control
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: risk of failure due to crew instability and operational complexity

cross_scene_arcs.title: Relationship with Eady Tse: From Deception to Intimacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Neil forms a deceptive but increasingly genuine bond with Eady, evolving from alias-based flirtation to emotional exposure and a shared escape plan, signaling a break from his solitary code.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: using alias 'Bukowski' to initiate contact with Eady
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: committing to a shared future and physically intimate bond with Eady
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Eady's verbal commitment and readiness for danger remain uncertain

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Betrayal and Retribution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Neil responds to escalating threats from Waingro, shifting from distrust during the heist to discovering mass betrayal and ultimately executing Waingro in cold retribution.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: demonstrating distrust of Waingro's erratic violence during the armored car heist
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: executing Waingro in a controlled, brutal act of personal justice
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: police surveillance during the execution triggers immediate manhunt

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rivalry and Recognition with Hanna
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Neil and Hanna engage in mutual surveillance and final confrontation, marked by unspoken respect and a lethal exchange that ends in Neil's death and silent acknowledgment.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: observing Hanna from a distance with tactical precision
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: dying in Hanna's presence with mutual recognition of skill

cross_scene_arcs.title: Shift from Isolation to Shared Fate
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Neil transitions from self-imposed emotional isolation to embracing vulnerability and interdependence, culminating in his decision to include Eady in his escape and future.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: asserting 'I'm alone, not lonely' while resisting emotional exposure
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: fully committing to a shared life on the run with Eady
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: tension between survival instincts and emotional connection remains unresolved at time of death

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Cost of the Pursuit
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hanna's investigation into a professional heist crew escalates from forensic analysis to direct confrontation with Neil McCauley, culminating in a fatal shootout. His relentless pursuit defines his professional identity but exacts a personal toll.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hanna assumes command of the Major Crime investigation into a precise armored truck heist.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hanna kills Neil in a final confrontation, achieving tactical closure but emotional emptiness.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the victory feels hollow, leaving Hanna without direction now that the chase is over.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Fractured Domestic Life
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hanna's repeated prioritization of duty over connection erodes his marriage, manifesting in emotional disengagement, trauma intrusion, and a final breakdown symbolized by a shattered plate.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hanna leaves for work abruptly, dismissing Justine's attempt to connect over breakfast.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hanna collapses at the sink after smashing a plate, overwhelmed and alone.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: he is unable to reconcile his emotional isolation with the need for intimacy.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Hanna and Neil: Mirror and Shadow
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hanna and Neil develop a mutual awareness that evolves into a tacit understanding of their parallel lives—both defined by discipline, isolation, and commitment to their roles—culminating in a fatal but respectful confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Neil surveils Hanna from a distance, photographing him with precision, signaling the start of mutual observation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hanna holds Neil's hand as he dies, acknowledging a shared code despite their opposing roles.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the bond between them complicates the moral clarity of Hanna's duty.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Erosion Under Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Hanna's emotional state deteriorates under the weight of trauma, operational setbacks, and personal failure, progressing from detachment to visible exhaustion, breakdown, and final resignation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Hanna reports a crime scene during dinner, unintentionally alienating Justine and showing emotional numbness.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Hanna stands in silence after killing Neil, physically intact but emotionally spent.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: he has no clear path to emotional recovery or reintegration into personal life.
